variants.name: 君主 ¶
variants.ability: 每个夜晚，你会得知两个角色，他们均在场或均不在场。一名爪牙知道你是君主。
variants.firstNightReminder: Wake a Minion and show them who the Monarch is. Wake the Monarch and show them two players.
variants.otherNightReminder: Wake the Monarch and show them two players.
variants.flavor: You've all read the news, no doubt. Those bastard columnists are quick at their work, I'll give them that. I trust that you all know what to do.
